en: February Is it difficult to say this word Fortunately we have a pronunciation hack for you Listen
ko: February. 이 단어 말하기 어려워? 다행히 발음 꿀팁이 있어. BBC

en: to how these BBC Learning English presenters say it In February I completed a 10 mile
ko: Learning English 진행자들이 어떻게 말하는지 들어봐. 2월에 16km 하이킹을 했어

en: hike In February I went to Milan in Italy In February I had a swim in the sea You can
ko: 2월에 이탈리아 밀라노에 갔어. 2월에 바다에서 수영했어. 첫 번째 R을

en: drop the first R sound and say it with three syllables Feb yury
ko: 빼고 세 음절로 Feb-yury라고 할 수 있어

en: Feb yury I went on holiday in February Or you can drop a syllable and say Feb ry
ko: Feb-yury. 2월에 휴가를 갔어. 아니면 음절을 빼고 Feb-ry라고 해도 돼

en: Re Feb ry I went on holiday in Feb ry What did you do in Feb ry Let us know in the comments
ko: Feb-ry. Feb-ry에 휴가를 갔어. Feb-ry에 뭘 했어? 댓글로 알려줘
